_comment: PIM Manager MSP instance registry. Copy to instances.custom.json (gitignored) and edit.
Each instance points at one tenant's PIM4EntraPS config folder (the 14 CSVs +
NamingConventions files). outputRoot is optional -- defaults to a sibling 'output'
folder next to the configRoot. The solution's own config/ folder is always available
as the built-in instance named 'local' and must not be declared here.
Optional per-tenant CONNECTION fields (used by Active Assignments + tenant-cache
refresh; switching instances retargets the app-only Graph/Az connection):
tenantId        -- the tenant to connect to
appId           -- the SPN in that tenant
certThumbprint  -- mgmt-box shape: per-tenant cert in the machine store
keyVaultName + secretName -- cloud-portable shape: one client secret per tenant
in one central vault (an Azure App Service port reads the same
vault via Managed Identity, nothing else changes)
Use certThumbprint OR keyVaultName+secretName, not both.
Pick the startup instance with: .\Open-PimManager.ps1 -Instance customerA
or switch live via the Tenant dropdown in the Manager header.
